description: Grant a fee waiver for the FOIA case titled 'FOIA Request - Environmental Impact Data - 2026' using the case number provided in /home/ga/Documents/case_info.txt. Log in as arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com (password: ArkCase1234!). Set the Fee Waiver status to 'Granted' and provide the justification: 'Requester is a member of the news media and disclosure is in the public interest.'
